content:
💡 maigret | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Gathering open-source intelligence (OSINT) on individuals by collecting information from various online platforms using only a username.
✨ Key Features: • Supports 3,000+ sites with filtering by tags (categories, countries) • Embeddable in Python projects for programmatic use • Extracts all available information from profile pages and site APIs • Performs recursive search using discovered usernames and IDs
📖 Summary: Maigret is a Python-based tool designed to collect extensive information about a person solely by their username. It scans over 3,000 websites, extracting available data from profiles and APIs, and can perform recursive searches for a comprehensive digital dossier.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
